title: impatiens balsamina var. micrantha
intro: Impatiens balsamina var. micrantha, also known as the small balsam or balsam flower, is a variety of the Impatiens balsamina plant, belonging to the balsam family and native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Impatiens balsamina var. micrantha include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically made into teas, infusions, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
